info.name: Buy Me a Coffee API
info.description: Read-only REST access to a creator's own Buy Me a Coffee account data: one-time supporters, memberships/subscriptions, and Extras purchases. Base URL: https://developers.buymeacoffee.com/api/v1. Authenticate with a personal access Bearer token created self-serve in the Developer Dashboard. Collection endpoints (/supporters, /subscriptions, /extras) and the status/page query params are confirmed; the by-ID paths are modeled from the documented 'get by ID' operations.

request.description: Returns all of your one-time supporters and their messages, if any, as a paginated collection.

item.name: Get a one-time supporter by ID

request.description: Returns a single one-time supporter by its unique ID. (By-ID path modeled from the documented operation.)
Returns all of your members with active and inactive statuses, paginated. Use status=all|active|inactive to filter.

item.name: Get a member / subscription by ID

request.description: Returns membership details by passing its unique identifier. (By-ID path modeled from the documented operation.)
Returns all of your Extras purchases data, paginated.

item.name: Get an Extras purchase by ID (BETA)

request.description: Returns data about an extra purchase by its unique Purchase ID. (By-ID path modeled from the documented operation.)
